title: Department Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Digital Technologies in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Digital Technologies:
McDonald's India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
